title: taraxacum assurgens
intro: Taraxacum assurgens, also known as the spring dandelion, is a perennial plant species belonging to the dandelion genus. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, and has been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Taraxacum assurgens include reducing blood pressure, improving digestive health, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant include tea, capsules, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
